meta.title: Aura Skin & Laser | Cary, North Carolina
meta.description: Laser hair reduction, skin revitalization, and aqua facials in Cary, NC. Effective results with a boutique, personalized experience.

featuredTreatments.title: Featured services

whyChooseUs.title: Why choose Aura
whyChooseUs.subtitle: A boutique experience with clinical precision and personal attention.

items.title: Personal care
items.description: Every treatment is performed by Dipna Patel, RN — not rotated between staff. You work with the same expert every visit.

items.title: Advanced technology
items.description: Aura uses the Motus AZ+ laser platform, offering effective results for all skin tones with minimal discomfort.

items.title: Inclusive expertise
items.description: Treatments are designed for light and dark skin tones alike, with protocols tailored to your unique skin profile.

about.title: The Aura difference
about.body: Aura Skin & Laser was founded by Dipna Patel, a registered nurse and skincare expert committed to helping people of all skin types look and feel their best. Because Dipna is the sole practitioner, every client receives her personal attention — before, during, and after each treatment.
bullets: Every treatment performed by Dipna Patel, RN
Personalized protocols for all skin tones

finalCta.title: Ready to discover your Aura?
finalCta.body: Book a free consultation and let's build a treatment plan around your goals.
